aboutMe.title: About me
description: Hi, I'm Víctor Manuel Menéndez López.

Wind Turbine Maintenance Technician with a full GWO certification (Working at Heights, First Aid, Manual Handling, Fire Awareness), obtained through the Skills programme by EDP Renewables and Vestas. My background in CNC machining and fleet logistics gives me a solid technical foundation for field work.

I also hold a Full Stack Web Development qualification, useful for interpreting technical data and SCADA systems. Licensed drone pilot, Open Category A1/A3 (AESA 2024). Immediately available and open to national and international mobility.
